name: menu
title: Menu
description: Positioned dropdown menu (`ds-menu`) with sections, selection, toggle items, and destructive items.

consumption.jsPropNote: Assign items, sections, anchor, and open via JS properties after customElements.whenDefined("ds-menu").

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

open.description: Controls visibility. Set via JS property.

items.description: Flat item list (use items or sections, not both).

anchor.description: Positioning trigger. Set via JS: menuEl.anchor = triggerEl

menuWidth.description: Optional fixed menu width (e.g. match trigger).
